global.description: The ad features a fresh green background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer on fresh favorites.

elements.label: green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the entire canvas, creating a fresh and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: empty space
elements.description: A blank rectangular area in the center, suggesting a placeholder for an image or graphic.

elements.label: promotional text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating '2-for-1 tonight Fresh favorites nearby' is prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Book now' in white on a black background, positioned at the bottom.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' appears in bold, dark text at the top left corner, conveying brand identity.

elements.label: sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, located at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, 2-for-1 offer, FreshDash logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the logo is at the top left, the discount badge is at the top right, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: FreshDash, SALE, 2-for-1 tonight Fresh favorites nearby, €19.99, Book now
